noCompanyExistingInSystem: Project Developer organization is not existing in the system for the logged in user
programmeExistsWithSameProgrammeId: Programme exists with same programme ID
cannotCreateCMAForOtherProjectParticipan: Cannot create CMA for other project developers
programmeNotExist: Programme is not existing with the given Programme ID
programmeIsNotInSuitableStageToProceed: Programme is not in a suitable state to proceed
shouldHaveOnlySingleCoordinateForSingleP: Should have only single pair of coordinates when project geography is single
shouldHaveMoreThanSingleCoordinateForMul: Should have more than single pair of coordinates when project geography is multiple
